affected_artifacts: All scapp_plsdb_* figures and evidence strata generated from truth_reconstruction_20260717

source.document: SCAPP supplementary methods, section S5, page 3

omitted_requirement: A contig/reference pair must first cover strictly more than 85% of the contig at strictly more than 85% identity before that contig can contribute marked regions to the reference; the reference then requires strictly more than 90% coverage.
impact: The provisional 25/157 prediction match count and 98/113 reference recovery count are not paper-method precision or recall and must not be used as the final benchmark.
replacement: Independent metaSPAdes reconstruction through K127 followed by the corrected two-stage truth builder and bidirectional scorer.
